memoryTrick: Right angle = L shape = 90° 📐 English L లాగా ఉంటుంది!

questionText: An angle less than 90° is called:
standardExplanation: Acute = less than 90°. Obtuse = more than 90°.

questionText: How many degrees in a straight line?
Sum of angles in a triangle is:
standardExplanation: All three angles of any triangle add up to 180°.
memoryTrick: TRI = 3 angles. 3 angles sum = 180°. Triangle fold chesi straight line avutundi! 📐
